detaileddescription.para:
Create a task queue.
db
- CRDT GlobalDB to use.
processing_topic
- Topic prefix used for task keys.

Enqueue a task and subtasks
task
- Task to add
subTasks
- List of subtasks

Get subtasks by task id, returns true if we got subtasks
taskId
- id to look for subtasks of
subTasks
- Reference of subtask list

Get a task by key.
Pair of task key and task if available.

Complete task by task key, returns true if successful
taskKey
- id to look for task
taskResult
- Reference of a task result

briefdescription.para: Checks whether a task is completed.
Fetches the task and returns the associated escrow path.

simplesect.para: If successful, it returns a escrow path string

detaileddescription.para:
Find if a task is locked
taskKey
- id to look for task

Lock a task by key
taskKey
- id to look for task

Move lock if expired, true if successful
taskKey
- id to look for task
task
- task reference

briefdescription.para: Mark a task key as bad to be skipped.

parameterdescription.para: Task key to mark as bad.

node.label: std::map< CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

node.label: std::map< CID, std::set< std::pair< CID, std::string > > >
std::map< CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >
